positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric fox silhouette curled up amongst stylized constellations and celestial bodies. The design should use a limited color palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, and creamy off-white, giving it an ethereal, cosmic vibe. The composition must be centered and circular, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean, sharp lines, perfect negative space, and strong contrast between the solid black/dark background and the intricate gold/white subject matter. The style should be a blend of modern Art Deco geometry and celestial map aesthetics. Vector illustration, perfect symmetry, high contrast, printable graphic design.
